branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Causal-wave landing / projector / carrier diagnostic; running-envelope context

description: Expected values of the eight causal-wave benchmark landings under the five-coefficient transport equation. Each landing is a closed algebraic composition of the five coefficients and small topological multipliers (1/2, 1/3, 1/4, pi/4, 4/pi, N_gen=3); no fits to target observables.

landings.physics: Net transport gain per unit tau equals down-sector Xi-spectral exponent
Freeze-in sourcing (alpha_xi^2) into sync-coupled DM carrier (eps_sync^2) summed over N_gen generations
Perfect de Sitter limit (eps=0) shifted by a damped second-order sync leak
Damping coupled through the common projector; 4/pi is the four-sphere/torus volume ratio
Source-to-projector ratio times diffusion-damping suppression times net gain
Full projector strength minus undamped quarter-sphere topology; electroweak mixing as a projector residue
landings.look_elsewhere_note: Within an enumerated search space of 222954 algebraic compositions; uniform-density null reproduces this hit at high probability (see selection_correction.json).

landings.physics: Half Xi-source minus twice damping equals horizon-boundary information density
landings.look_elsewhere_note: Row L7 ascends to a rational identity in Q under the coefficient-reduction system R: alpha_xi/2 - 2*gamma = 9/20 - 1/5 = 1/4, with closed-form integer-uniqueness N_gen = 3. The multiple-trial inflation correction does not apply to a closed-form algebraic identity; therefore L7 is exempt from the search-space LE caveat that affects L6 and L8.

landings.physics: Undamped quarter-sphere minus diffusion-deficit quarter equals the spectral-dimension-2 exponent
landings.look_elsewhere_note: Coefficient-perturbation null reproduces this target at probability ~0.765; the structural target itself is independently fixed by the continuum-limit program.

landings.physics: Time-time component of the anisotropic cosmological-constant tensor Lambda_munu in the emergent Einstein equation. Identified as the squared Xi-mode propagation amplitude (Reaction rate squared = Reaction rate * Survival probability).
landings.look_elsewhere_note: Row L9 ascends to a rational identity in Q under the coefficient-reduction system R: alpha_xi^2 = (9/10)^2 = 81/100, with the additional structural identity alpha_xi = (1-gamma) closing the form to alpha_xi*(1-gamma). Blind-fit Lambda_t* on the per-node 4x4 Frobenius residual at N=84 gives 0.811(+/-0.01), matching the rational target 81/100 to 0.12%. See P4 src/verify_galerkin_calibrated_gpu.py for the per-node fit protocol.

landings.physics: Spatial-isotropic component of Lambda_munu = -gamma^2/2 = -eps_sync^2 * gamma. Negative half of the dissipation-rate squared (or equivalently, negative dissipation-sync product), emerges from the System R identity eps_sync^2 = gamma/2.
landings.look_elsewhere_note: Row L10 ascends to a rational identity in Q: -gamma^2/2 = -(1/10)^2/2 = -1/200 = -eps_sync^2*gamma (using eps_sync^2 = gamma/2 = 1/20). Blind-fit Lambda_s* on the per-node 4x4 Frobenius residual at N=84 gives -0.005, matching the rational target -1/200 exactly. See P4 src/verify_galerkin_calibrated_gpu.py.

robust_core_definition.claim: PRECISE_2.5 closure (max residual <= 2.5%) under fixed coefficients without fits

look_elsewhere_caveat_definition.claim: EXACT but enumeration-induced; should not be reported as standalone structural EXACT proofs without the multiple-trial inflation correction.

Q_exact_under_R_definition.claim: L7 (alpha_xi/2 - 2*gamma = 1/4) is a rational identity in Q under the coefficient-reduction system R; closed-form integer-uniqueness scan returns N_gen = 3 as the unique positive integer. The trial-factor correction does not apply to a closed-form algebraic identity.
